12 typedef enum RFID_request_status_t
13 {

15  RFID_REQUEST_PENDING,
16  RFID_REQUEST_NOK_INVALID_COMMAND,

19  RFID_REQUEST_NOK_RX_COMM_ERROR,
20  RFID_INVALID_TAG_INFORMATION,
21  RFID_REQUEST_NO_TAGS
22 }RFID_request_status_t;

25 {
